LanguageData.VFEE_ArtExhibit_Outcome.comps.0.label: participant count
LanguageData.VFEE_ArtExhibit_Outcome.comps.1.label: room impressiveness
LanguageData.VFEE_ArtExhibit_Outcome.description: Depending on ritual quality, participants will get between {MINMOOD} and {MAXMOOD} mood for {MOODDAYS} days.
